response.justification: The candidate lacks sufficient demonstrated experience in C++ and large-scale cloud infrastructure as required; while they have diverse full-stack experience, their C++ exposure is limited to academic and legacy tools (NI LabWindows), with no evidence of 8+ years of professional C++ development or leadership in cloud compute platforms.
strengths: Strong full-stack and polyglot programming experience across multiple languages and domains
Proven mentorship and workshop leadership in testing, TDD, and software practices
Active open-source contributions and community engagement in DevOps and GIS tooling
concerns: No clear evidence of 8 years of professional C++ programming as required
Lacks demonstrable experience building or leading cloud compute platforms at scale
Minimal exposure to core cloud technologies (AWS/GCP/Azure architecture, distributed systems design)
